update_desc: A new version of Zero Startpage has been installed.
sync_no_images_warning: Note: Sync only includes settings. Images/Videos are not synced. Use 'Export JSON' for full backup.
sync_backup_success: Settings synced successfully to your Chrome account!
sync_restore_confirm: This will overwrite your current settings (except images). Continue?
sync_restore_no_data: No backup found on your Chrome account.
sync_error_quota: Backup failed: Settings data is too large for Chrome Sync. Please reduce your saved settings (e.g. remove some custom themes or fonts) or use 'Export JSON' for a full backup.
language_custom_hint: Open Quick Guide, copy the AI prompt, then paste the translated JSON back into the modal.
language_modal_intro: Choose a guide language, copy the ready-made AI prompt, give it to an AI, then paste the JSON result here.
language_modal_ai_hint: Recommended free AI options with good context for this prompt:
language_modal_step_1: Choose the language you want from Guide language.
language_modal_step_2: Copy the ready-made AI prompt and send it to an AI. The prompt already tells AI what to translate and what to keep unchanged.
language_modal_step_3: Paste the result below, then install it.
language_json_placeholder: Paste translated JSON here. Accepted: {"code":"es","name":"Español","translations":{...}} or raw {"settings_title":"..."}
language_prompt_copied: AI translation prompt copied. Send it to AI, then paste the translated JSON here.
language_invalid_code: Please enter a language code, such as es, ja, fr, or id.
settings_m3_palette_style_hint: Choose how Material colors are mixed
settings_m3_auto_bg_hint: Update M3 accent when background changes
settings_m3_widgets_hint: Use the current M3 accent as widget backgrounds
settings_local_fonts_hint: Use fonts installed on your computer
settings_custom_font_hint: Enter exact font name from Google Fonts
alert_font_error: Could not load font. Please check the font name.
settings_tab_icon_hint: Max 2 letters, 1 emoji, or upload an image (leave blank for default)
alert_local_fonts_not_supported: Local Font Access is not supported by your browser or permission was denied.
alert_api_unavailable: Browser Bookmarks API is not available. Please run as extension.
alert_missing_fields: Please enter both a title and a URL.
alert_import_duplicates: Found {count} duplicate bookmark(s). Do you still want to import them?
alert_no_selection: No new bookmarks selected or they already exist.
settings_background_media_quality_hint: Lower image size for fetched/uploaded backgrounds. Still mode pauses video backgrounds after loading.
settings_compress_saved_error: Could not compress saved images right now.
settings_unsplash_missing_key:
Please enter your Unsplash Access Key first.
You can get a free key at unsplash.com/developers.
alert_gradient_css_copy_failed: Unable to copy CSS. Please copy manually.
preset_code_invalid: This preset code is invalid or belongs to another preset type.
visual_preset_bundle_hint: Gradient, Multi-Color, SVG Wave, Effect and Theme
effect_preset_bundle_hint: Effect choice, colors, performance and effect-specific settings
alert_delete_bg_confirm: Are you sure you want to remove this background?
search_lens_tooltip: Search any image with Google Lens
modern_gradient_hint: Tip: Try 'AI Presets' for professionally picked color combinations!
settings_clock_lunar_mode_hint: Choose whether the clock appends the lunar date or replaces the Gregorian date.
quick_access_button_radius_hint: Applies to settings-toggle and active quick buttons.
quick_access_bar_radius_hint: Applies to the full quick access panel.
settings_calendar_display_mode_hint: Choose whether the month grid shows solar dates, lunar dates, or both.
settings_reset_layout_hint: (Resets widget positions & effect colors to default)
alert_reset_layout_confirm: Select items you want to restore to default:
reset_opt_all: Entire Settings (Clears all effect customizations & system configurations)
reset_opt_cloud: Delete Cloud Sync backup from Google Account
style_presets_hint: One-click bundles for bookmark and music player styling.
notepad_empty: No notes yet. Click + to add one.
calendar_event_action:
Update event or Delete?
(OK = Update, Cancel = Delete)
confirm_export_include_unsplash_key: Include Unsplash Access Key in exported JSON?
export_select_sections: Select data to include in JSON export.
export_select_at_least_one: Please select at least one section to export.
export_local_media_error: Could not package local images/videos into JSON. Open the image/video background once, then try again.
export_option_local_media: Local Images/Videos (for transfer to another machine)
import_clear_existing: Clear existing data before importing (WARNING: This will delete current settings, bookmarks, and todos)
import_select_sections: Select data to import from this JSON backup.
import_json_code_prompt: Paste a copied Zero Start Page JSON backup code below.
settings_unsplash_api_info: Get a free key at unsplash.com/developers
settings_unsplash_api_info_video: Video how to get api key
settings_google_fonts_info: Get a free google font  at fonts.google.com
background_animation_preset_bundle_hint: Gradient V2, Silk, Light Pillar, Mist Light Streams and Splash Cursor
settings_bookmark_group_use_accent: Use accent color on default grid
bookmark_open_behavior_message: By default, bookmarks now open in the current tab. You can switch this anytime in Settings > Custom Bookmark > Layout & Behavior.
bookmark_open_behavior_current_desc: Clicking a bookmark replaces the Start Page in the current tab.
bookmark_open_behavior_new_desc: Keep the Start Page open and launch bookmarks beside it.
settings_drag_note: (Note: This also enables reordering for your saved backgrounds, colors, and gradients by dragging them)
settings_bookmark_item_hint: 💡 Customize colors, size, and shadow for individual bookmark tiles.
settings_bookmark_group_hint: 💡 Customize the appearance (background, text color) of the folder Tabs navigation at the top.
settings_clock_font_weekday_only: Clock Font Applies To weekday only
settings_custom_title_shadow_hint: Use a soft blur and a small vertical offset for cleaner Vietnamese text.
settings_custom_title_border_hint: Keep the outline thin so accents and long words stay readable.
donate_desc: Calling all generous patrons! Your kindness helps keep this project alive and caffeinated:
donate_thank_you: A massive thank you to our generous patrons! ❤️
settings_font_restriction_note: Note: 'Electroharmonix' and 'Anurati' fonts only apply to Clock & Date.
alert_bg_gallery_full: Gallery full! Please remove some backgrounds before saving more.
alert_upload_limit: You can only upload up to {count} custom backgrounds.
alert_local_bg_performance_warning: You have saved 20+ custom backgrounds. More saved images, especially GIF/video backgrounds, can use more memory and make Startpage slower.
g_apps_edit_url_prompt: Enter a custom URL for this app:
lcp_hide_bookmark_bar_desc: Instructions to hide Chrome's native bookmark bar.
hide_bookmark_step1_linux: 1. Open Terminal and run this command (requires sudo):
hide_bookmark_step2: 2. Copy and run the command below:
hide_bookmark_link_hint: (Copy and paste the link if it doesn't open)
hide_bookmark_tip: Tip: To show the bookmark bar again, run the same command but change /d 0 to /d 1.
hide_bookmark_tip_win: Tip: To show the bookmark bar again, run the same command but change /d 0 to /d 1.
hide_bookmark_tip_mac: Tip: To show the bookmark bar again, run the same command but change false to true. You may need to restart Chrome.
hide_bookmark_tip_linux: Tip: To show the bookmark bar again, change false to true in the file or delete the file.
hide_bookmark_note: Note: Only perform this if you really want to. Try (Ctrl+Shift+B) on Chrome's default New Tab page if methods don't work use cmd.
bug_report_desc: If you encounter issues, copy the browser/version info below and send it to the developer.
bug_report_language_prompt: Which language do you want to use for the bug report form?
bug_report_language_vi_desc: Open the Vietnamese bug report form.
bug_report_language_en_desc: Open the English bug report form.
timer_alarm_upload_first: Upload a custom sound before selecting this option.
timer_alarm_file_too_large: Please choose an audio file under 12 MB.
timer_alarm_upload_failed: Could not save that sound. Please try another file.
first_run_open_source_message:
Zero Start Page is open source. You can view the project at
ChickenSoup269/Zero-Start-Page

If you find a bug or have a suggestion, you can open an issue here:
GitHub Issues
first_run_import_bookmarks_prompt: Choose which Chrome bookmark folders you want to import. For example, pick Bookmark Bar for the shortcuts shown under Chrome's address bar, or Other Bookmarks for saved folders.
first_run_import_bookmarks_none: No new Chrome bookmarks were found.
first_run_import_bookmarks_error: Could not import Chrome bookmarks right now.
first_run_name_prompt: What should your Start Page call you?
first_run_zoom_prompt: Pick a comfortable start size. 80% is recommended and can be changed later in Layout Controls.
first_run_zoom_80_desc: Balanced size for clocks, bookmarks, and widgets.
first_run_zoom_90_desc: Larger UI with less empty space.
first_run_zoom_75_desc: More breathing room for heavier layouts.
first_run_style_prompt: Pick a layout to start with. You can change it later in Settings.
first_run_style_dock_desc: Bottom dock, compact icons, easy for new tabs.
first_run_style_clean_desc: Simple centered bookmarks with minimal background.
first_run_style_sidebar_desc: Vertical folder list for heavier bookmark use.
first_run_guide_intro: All set. Next, a short guide will show the newest customization areas in Settings.
first_run_guide_congrats_message: You're ready to use Zero Start Page. You can replay this guide anytime from Settings > Layout & Features.
first_run_guide_settings_desc: This is where you tune the whole Start Page. The guide highlights the main controls plus newer customization added after June 6.
first_run_guide_language_desc: Change the interface language here. You can also open custom language tools to add another translation.
first_run_guide_page_title_desc: Set the browser tab title and small tab icon so this page feels more like your own workspace.
first_run_guide_themes_desc: Start from a theme preset, save your current look, try style presets, or open Theme Web Beta to browse shared looks.
first_run_guide_background_desc: Add an image, video, color, Unsplash photo, or saved local background. This section also controls blur, brightness, image fit, and galleries.
first_run_guide_accent_desc: Pick the main accent color, extract it from the current background, or let widgets follow the same color system.
first_run_guide_gradient_desc: Build gradient, SVG wave, and multi-color backgrounds. The Visual Preset Hub can copy or apply a full shareable visual bundle.
first_run_guide_animated_desc: Use richer animated backgrounds such as gradient motion, silk, light pillars, liquid light, or splash cursor effects.
first_run_guide_effects_desc: Choose overlay effects and tune their colors. These are lighter visual layers that sit above your background.
first_run_guide_font_desc: Change the general font, clock font, or load and save a Google Font for later.
first_run_guide_clock_desc: Customize time format, date format, clock style, colors, size, and display mode.
first_run_guide_bookmarks_desc: Tune bookmark layout, icon size, spacing, background style, drag behavior, and the newer bookmark group tab controls.
first_run_guide_bookmark_groups_desc: Customize bookmark group tabs with background and text colors, opacity, font size, counts, borders, and interaction behavior.
first_run_guide_custom_title_desc: Show a personal title, move it freely, and adjust its color, size, shadow, border, and text effects.
first_run_guide_layout_desc: Turn page modules on or off, flip layout direction, adjust quick controls, and replay this guide when needed.
first_run_guide_google_apps_desc: Show or hide the Google Apps corner. Open the apps menu to search, drag apps, resize the popup, show names, and customize app icons.
first_run_guide_search_desc: Choose from more search engines, toggle the Gemini AI icon, and tune the search bar width and blur. The search area also supports image and Lens workflows.
